changes: Made fetching ALL 4 RSS feeds mandatory instead of optional — the baseline skill said 'Optionally supplement with Reuters/NPR' which caused the agent to only fetch the world feed
Added explicit JSON output format with categories array structure matching test expectations (name, source, summary, articles per category)
Added highlights section guidance requiring stories from multiple categories
Added key_numbers extraction guidance for statistics/data points
Improved RSS parsing instructions to include pubDate and category extraction
Added ISO 8601 date format conversion guidance
Removed voice summary section (irrelevant to tasks, wasted context tokens)
